'''Niuk Niuv''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]].

==Biography==
Niuv was a member of the [[New Republic Advisory Council]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was part of the [[Anti-Jedi sentiment/Legends|anti-Jedi]] majority, and was rumored to be connected to major [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] interests in Sullustan Space.

Niuv believed that [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] claims about the threat of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] was to deflect criticism from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Fall of Coruscant]], Niuv aided [[Pwoe]] in his attempt to become the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]], but after the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]], he ceased aiding Pwoe. When [[Cal Omas]] was [[New Republic Presidential election, 28 ABY|elected]] Chief of State and reorganized the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] into the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], Niuv was appointed to the [[Galactic Alliance Advisory Council]], mostly as a concession to the anti-Jedi minority remaining in the [[Galactic Alliance Senate|Senate]]. After the [[Battle of Ebaq]], he urged a full push against the Yuuzhan Vong, though this was voted down after the [[Battle of Bastion]].
